title: T-053 — Disposition Bridge P2 backend and decision modal
prompt:
# T-053 — Disposition Bridge P2 backend and decision modal

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §7.4 Epic E4, §10.3, §17.1 PLE disposition, §15.4 V-SCHED-10.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create the P2 disposition bridge wiring and modal task with clear feature gating.

## Implementation contract
Listen to wo.completed, evaluate disposition_bridge_v1, respect V-SCHED-10, and coordinate with Warehouse LP state transitions through defined service contracts.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement P2 disposition bridge event flow and decision modal wiring with timeout/extend actions.
pipeline_inputs.details: Combines backend event handler with disposition_decision_modal because modal is only meaningful with notification/deadline actions. Feature-gated; to_stock remains P1 baseline.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: Intermediate cascade DAG and disposition baseline to_stock.
LP states, put-away, reservation handoff and cancellation semantics.
wo.completed event and output LP creation.

acceptance_criteria: Given flag planning.disposition_bridge.enabled=false, then P2 modal and handlers do not alter to_stock baseline.
Given planner_decides item with shelf_life_hours<=24, then notification/deadline is created and modal allows To Stock or Direct Continue plus Extend 1h/4h with reason.
Given deadline passes, then default to_stock is applied and outbox/audit record the auto-decision.

Given the UI task is closed, when CLOSEOUT is recorded, then it includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED integration tests for direct_continue, planner_decides timeout, extend reason, cancel handoff.
Run pnpm --filter web test scheduler/disposition-bridge disposition-actions.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not enable disposition bridge in P1 by default.
Do not create orphan LP reserved_for_child_wo without cleanup.
Do not bypass Warehouse LP state machine.
pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
ui_closeout_evidence: Desktop screenshot/artifact of the implemented surface compared 1:1 to prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:562-629` (structural, visual, and interaction parity).
Playwright trace artifact for the primary happy path and at least one error/blocked/permission-denied path.
Axe (or equivalent) accessibility result, or a documented blocker with rationale.
List of intentional deviations from the prototype/UX with reason (e.g. P2 gating, RBAC hide).
Reference parity expectations in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` and translation notes in `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-planning-ext.md`.
